questionHtml:
0.2 mol of sodium hydrogencarbonate is decomposed by heating until constant mass.

2 NaHCO3 (s) → Na2CO3 (s) + H2O (g) + CO2 (g)

How many moles of gas are produced?

A.  0.1

B.  0.2

C.  0.3

D.  0.4

meta.title: 0.2 mol of sodium hydrogencarbonate is decomposed by heating until constant mass. 2 NaHCO3 (s) → Na2CO3 (s) + H2O (g) + CO2 (g) How many moles of gas are produced? A. 0.1 B. 0.2 C.
